RePass Cloud Pty Ltd

Engineering-led software
built for production.

We design, build, and operate enterprise-grade software platforms and cloud infrastructure tooling for organisations that need reliable technology in production environments.

Work with us Case studies
Who we are

Not a generic consultancy

RePass Cloud Pty Ltd is an Australian software engineering company and consultancy that designs, builds, and operates enterprise-grade software platforms, cloud infrastructure tooling, automation systems, and operational utilities for organisations that need practical, reliable technology built to run in real environments.

We are not a generic software consultancy. We are an engineering-led organisation that builds serious operational software — from large multi-tenant SaaS platforms through to focused tools that solve specific, painful problems across cloud infrastructure, Windows environments, identity, reporting, file systems, and business operations.

Our primary cloud focus is Microsoft Azure and AWS, with selective support for Google Cloud where required. Our delivery spans modern .NET platform development, PowerShell scripting and module development, Windows systems engineering, identity and access automation, and cloud-native design patterns.

What we do

Five capability areas

Enterprise Platform Development

Multi-tenant SaaS architecture, identity integration, tenant-aware configuration, audit logging, API-driven integrations, and commercial licensing models. Cinturon360 is the primary example.

Cloud Infrastructure Tooling

Cloud cost and spend analysis, SSL certificate lifecycle management, cloud infrastructure automation, and Windows Golden VM automation across Azure and AWS.

Business Operations & IT Tooling

ServiceNow ticket management, IT reporting automation, Windows machine performance tooling, fast delete utilities, SSH credential management, and AD identity automation.

Microsoft 365 & Identity Automation

User onboarding/offboarding triggered from HR changes, distribution list management, shared mailbox automation, identity lifecycle management, and cross-system integrations.

PowerShell Automation & Scripting

Reusable PowerShell modules and enterprise scripts for Windows, Azure, Active Directory, Microsoft 365, and enterprise IT environments — maintained and distributable across organisations.

Security-first Engineering

Identity-centric access controls, least privilege design, strong separation of concerns, and auditability baked into every system from the ground up — not bolted on afterwards.

Flagship product

Cinturon360

Cinturon360 is our actively developed and maintained enterprise SaaS platform. It is the operational control layer for organisations that need to manage complexity, customers, partners, and internal teams under structured governance without losing visibility or agility.

Cinturon360 is not just an automation tool. It is a platform for doing work in a controlled, auditable, and scalable way — one that grows with the organisation rather than becoming a source of technical debt.

Multi-tenant with strong isolation
Microsoft Entra ID integration
Full audit logging
Role-based permissions
Regional hosting flexibility
Visit Cinturon360
Technology focus

What we build with

.NET Azure AWS Entra ID Active Directory Microsoft 365 Windows Server PowerShell Hyper-V Google Cloud Docker WireGuard
How we work

Our engineering principles

Security-first by design
Every system we build is architected with security and compliance requirements from day one, not bolted on afterwards.
Engineering-led, not sales-led
We focus on getting the implementation right. Our products exist because we saw problems in the market and built tools to fix them.
Automation over manual process
If a human is doing something a machine can do reliably, we automate it. That frees people to do the work that actually matters.
Production-proven
We build for real environments with real load, compliance requirements, and audit obligations. Everything is designed to run in production.
Compliance & audit-ready
Governance, access control, audit logging, and evidence trails are built in — not an afterthought.
Built in Australia
Our team, our infrastructure, and our support are Australian. Data sovereignty and local compliance requirements are things we understand.
Work with us

Let's build something together.

We work with organisations that need enterprise software, cloud automation, or operational tooling built properly — not quickly patched, not over-engineered.

Get in touch
